author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Parent issue tracking implementation of the crosslink dashboard feature designed in DESIGN-CROSSLINK-DASHBOARD.md (committed on feat/429-crosslink-dashboard as 6d019b38). Phase 1 (MVP) = 11 subissues (#690-#700), blocking relationships wired. Phase 2 (convenience) and Phase 3 (polish) will spawn subissues when we get there. First focus: #690 (P1.1 scaffolding). Design doc authoritative spec: GH #429 is the originating bug the feature resolves.
